title: Financial Payments Fraud Pipeline
summary: Event-driven fraud-detection pipeline with contract validation, streaming features, online scoring, and operational dashboards.
outcome: Release-pending portfolio project; a public demo waits for a verified, cost-controlled deployment.

deployment.runtime: Docker Compose and Azure Container Apps

metrics: Warm local p95 scoring latency 7.67 ms
evaluation: Chronological holdout evaluation, top-k precision, latency tests, load tests, and smoke tests are documented
operationalTradeoffs: Streaming fidelity and observability increase local complexity and managed-cloud operating cost
disclaimer: Uses synthetic payment data only. It does not score real cardholders or provide financial-risk decisions.
